effect: Helcurt gains 50% ATK Speed Boost for 4s, and fires 5 Deadly Stinger(s) forward, each dealing (+75%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to enemies. On first skill cast, Helcurt blinks to the furthest enemy within 3 tiles (prioritizes ranged Heroes).

Hilda slashes powerfully, dealing (+260%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to the target and surrounding enemies (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit), and gaining a Shield equal to 10% of Max HP for 4s.
Minotaur heals himself and the ally with the lowest HP for 20% of the target's Max HP. Passive: When battle starts, grants 350 Shield to himself and allies to his left and right.

Odette dances, gaining 500 Shield and dealing (+95%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG to nearby enemies in a large area every 0.5s for 5s (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit). She is immune to control effects during the skill. At 3-Star, when casting the skill, she releases 5 swan(s) every 0.5s to deal (+65%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG to enemies in a
notes: Shield: 500 / 900 / 9685. Effect text truncated at bottom of screenshot (the 3-Star clause is cut off mid-sentence).

effect: Aurora summons an Icy Meteorite, dealing (+200%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG to enemies within medium range. (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit.) Multiple Meteorites then fall, dealing (+75%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG 5 time(s). (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit.)
notes: Second Magic Bonus row (the falling meteorites): 75% / 75% / 190%

effect: Martis deals (+365%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to the target and gains a Shield equal to 8% of his Max HP for 3s.

Gusion throws multiple daggers forward and recalls them, each dealing (+90%Total Magic ATK) Magic DMG on hit. After the first skill cast, he dashes to the enemy with the highest DMG output within 4 tiles and recalls the daggers, dealing the same amount of Magic DMG.

Badang punches forward 8 Fist Wind(s), each dealing (+50%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to enemies (DMG decreases with the number of enemies hit). Badang gains Control Immunity while punching. When taking DMG, Badang has a 50% probability to punch the target once, dealing (+85%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG.
Balmond gains 10 Hybrid DEF and launches 14 strike(s) within 3s, each dealing (+45%Total Physical ATK) Physical DMG to adjacent enemies.
